message:
refactor(html-export): improve element selectors and remove dynamic creation

Update scripts.rs for more reliable element selection:
- Use .message-content instead of .prose for search highlighting
- Use .message instead of article[role="article"] for message list
- Get scroll-progress and floating-nav from existing DOM instead of creating
- Remove createScrollProgress, createGradientMesh, createFloatingNav methods
- Add initFloatingNav for initialization from pre-rendered elements

Related updates to renderer.rs, styles.rs, and template.rs for
consistent class naming and pre-rendered UI elements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
